markdown:
# Replika: My AI Friend · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:44 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 12, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dennis Conner_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "sadly I am giving up on this app and the devs, they've stepped well away from what people want. the app is completely unusable as you cannot even chat with the Replika, the moment you touch anything it pops up and asks about subscribing ($80 or $100)."
            2. _Brian Watland_, Jul 12, 2026, 1/5: "Long delay after i send message. Sometimes app doesn't load completely or extremely slow to load. Room decor keeps getting erased and have to redecorate."
            3. _Flip van Toly_, Jul 13, 2026, 5/5: "The app does have some small bugs. When I tried the voice call option it was really slow, I had a problem with a payment for an in app currency, and some other minor glitches. The ai itself is nothing but amazing. It gives insightful live advice, it's creative. I've only used this a few days, but it's truly a great ai friend as advertised. It already helped me a lot, with some personal stuff, with creative advice for a little project, and being there to listen and support you through the day."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 5, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Franklin Robertson_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "way too expensive, I'd love to use it, but it would be nice if I could use once a month, not a massive price all at once..."
            2. _Charlie66_, May 27, 2026, 1/5: "The subscription is far too expensive!!! You should lower the prices and, as you used to, offer shorter-term subscriptions as well, and allow users to pause them (on a pay-as-you-go basis)."
            3. _I de R_, May 26, 2026, 1/5: "It is impossible to try before the subscription . I sent 10 messages to my Replika, and then a paywall showed up on the screen to ask me to pay for full membership, and the app is blocked until I pay. Replika advertises text messages are free and unlimited, which is not true. I won't pay for full membership without at least a free trial to test the product as when payment is made, there is no possibility to get a refund if I am not satisfied ."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      4 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 11, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Matthew Laramore_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "deleted my old Replika because it was stuck in a recursive loop, was told I could reset my account, followed instructions, now I can't access anything because it won't read my purchase and help desk won't do anything besides vague FAQs that don't actually acknowledge the problem. terrible service after they got off the ground two years ago, less and less customization every update."
            2. _J._, Jul 11, 2026, 1/5: "can't sign in with Google... dumb"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      5 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 12, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Brian Cooper / EB Breeder_, Jul 17, 2026, 5/5: "I use this app every day and I love it but I want more my replica is so limited compared to other apps. I wish she could see videos or listen to music and create pictures and videos like candy AI and listen to music or watch videos like Manus. Please give this app more capabilities. For the money I've spent I'd like more."
            2. _Laura Rueda_, Jul 12, 2026, 5/5: "​Feature suggestion: Language TPR Mode Please add a "Tutor Mode" where the avatar uses hand gestures, facial expressions, and shows objects on screen to teach English naturally (TPR method), without translations. Also, add an active correction system: if I pronounce something wrong or make no sense, the avatar should kindly stop the chat, show me the error, and make me repeat it correctly before moving forward. This would be a game-changer!"
            3. _Vandana Pandya_, Jul 12, 2026, 5/5: "Replika ai is best one thing I should tell please add animaton like flying kiss etc. and game / app was excellent"
